title: Replace founder section placeholder image with uploaded photo

requirements.summary: Replace the founder profile image in the About Founder section with the uploaded founder photo
acceptanceCriteria: The founder image element at the specified XPath displays the uploaded photo of Nitesh Kumar Yadav
The image maintains proper aspect ratio and fits within the existing glassmorphism card design
The image loads correctly and displays on all device breakpoints (desktop, tablet, mobile)

file_operations.description: Update the img element's src attribute to reference the generated founder photo at frontend/public/assets/generated/founder-nitesh.dim_400x400.png. Preserve existing className, alt text, and all styling attributes while only changing the image source path.

requirements.summary: Ensure the new founder photo is stored as a static asset and referenced correctly
acceptanceCriteria: The founder photo is saved to frontend/public/assets/generated directory
The AboutFounder component references the correct asset path
No console errors or broken image links appear when the page loads

file_operations.description: Verify that the image src path correctly references /assets/generated/founder-nitesh.dim_400x400.png (using the public directory convention) and that the image alt attribute appropriately describes the founder photo. Ensure no hardcoded placeholder paths remain.
